<content>1: # Content Status Badging ("Soon" & "Just Added") - Specification
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: Add visual status badges to Courses and Lessons to highlight new additions ("Just Added") and upcoming content ("Soon"). This increases student engagement and manages content expectations.
6: 
7: ## Requirements
8: 
9: ### 1. Status Types
10: 
11: #### 1.1 "Soon" (בקרוב) Tag
12: - **Purpose**: Build anticipation for upcoming content
13: - **Student Experience**: 
14:   - "Soon" badge appears on Course/Lesson card
15:   - Content is locked - clicking shows message "This content is being prepared and will be available soon"
16: - **Visuals**: Neutral/secondary color (Gray or Light Blue)
17: 
18: #### 1.2 "Just Added" (חדש) Tag
19: - **Purpose**: Draw attention to fresh material
20: - **Student Experience**:
21:   - "Just Added" or "New" badge appears on Course/Lesson card
22:   - Fully accessible - no access restrictions
23: - **Visuals**: High-energy color (Bright Green or Yellow)
24: 
25: ### 2. Admin Configuration
26: 
27: #### 2.1 Fields in Course/Lesson Edit View
28: - **Status Selector**: Dropdown or Radio with options:
29:   - None (Default)
30:   - Soon
31:   - Just Added
32: - **Visibility Toggle**: Hide "Soon" content from students before ready to show
33: - **(Optional) New Until Date**: Auto-expire "Just Added" badge after set date
34: 
35: ### 3. Design Guidelines
36: 
37: #### 3.1 Badge Styling
38: - Shape: Pill-shaped with rounded corners (`rounded-full`)
39: - Font: Assistant Bold, `text-xs` size
40: - Placement:
41:   - Course Grid: Top right or top left corner of course card
42:   - Lesson List: Next to lesson title or progress circle
43: 
44: #### 3.2 Animations
45: - "Just Added" badges: Subtle pulse animation to draw attention
46: 
47: ## Acceptance Criteria
48: 
49: 1. Admins can mark a lesson as "Soon" in Payload CMS admin panel
50: 2. Students cannot access "Soon" content - clicking shows locked message
51: 3. "Just Added" badge appears immediately on homepage/course list when enabled
52: 4. Badges adapt to responsive design (mobile/desktop) without overlapping course title
53: 5. "Soon" badge uses neutral color (Gray/Light Blue)
54: 6. "Just Added" badge uses bright color (Green/Yellow)
55: 7. Badge uses Assistant Bold font at text-xs size
56: 8. "Just Added" badge has subtle pulse animation
57: 9. Optional: "New Until" date field auto-removes "Just Added" badge after expiry
58: 
59: ## Technical Implementation (Existing)
60: 
61: ### Already Implemented ✅
62: 
63: 1. **Backend Fields** (`src/server/payload/fields/contentStatus.ts`):
64:    - `contentStatus`: select field with None/Soon/Just Added options
65:    - `contentStatusVisible`: checkbox to hide "Soon" content from students
66:    - `contentStatusExpiresAt`: optional date for auto-expiry
67:    - Already added to both Courses and Lessons collections
68: 
69: 2. **ContentStatusBadge Component** (`src/ui/web/shared/ContentStatusBadge/index.tsx`):
70:    - Gray badge for "Soon" status
71:    - Green badge with pulse animation for "Just Added"
72:    - Handles expiry date checking
73:    - Uses translations for badge labels
74: 
75: 3. **CourseCard Integration** (`src/app/(frontend)/courses/_components/CourseCard/index.tsx`):
76:    - Displays ContentStatusBadge in top-right corner
77:    - Implements locked behavior for "Soon" courses
78:    - Shows toast message when clicking "Soon" course
79:    - Disables button for "Soon" courses
80: 
81: 4. **Backend Query Filtering** (`src/server/repos/queries/`):
82:    - Courses query filters out invisible "Soon" content
83:    - Lessons query filters out invisible "Soon" content
84: 
85: 5. **Translations** (`src/i18n/en.json`, `src/i18n/he.json`):
86:    - `soonBadge`: "Soon" / "בקרוב"
87:    - `justAddedBadge`: "New" / "חדש"
88:    - `contentLocked`: Lock message

|-----------|------|-------------------|

### ContentStatus Badge Tests

| Test Name | Type | Expected Behavior |
|-----------|------|-------------------|
| renders "Soon" badge when lesson.contentStatus is "soon" | unit | Shows "Soon" text badge when lesson has soon status |

| does not render badge when justAdded has expired date | unit | Badge hidden when contentStatusExpiresAt is in the past |
| renders badge when justAdded has future expiry date | unit | Badge shown when contentStatusExpiresAt is in the future |

### Locked Content Behavior Tests

|-----------|------|-------------------|

| renders SystemLink for normal (non-soon) lessons | unit | SystemLink renders for normal lessons |
| renders SystemLink for "justAdded" lessons (navigates normally) | unit | Correct href to lesson page, no toast shown |

## Test Execution Results

The tests verify the implementation at `src/app/(frontend)/courses/_components/LessonCard/index.tsx`:
